creator: tr@freebsd.mayn.de
text:
I wrote the ports stuff for the AtariST Emulator STonX (STonX Version
        0.6.7-epsilon). You can download it at freebsd.cdrom.com/pub/FreeBSD/
        incoming/ports-stonx1.tgz). Please test and add it (or not) to the
        FreeBSD ports.

        BTW: STonX needs a Rom Image. I can send you a copy for testing.
